case_title: THE CONNECTICUT INDEMNITY CO A CONNECTICUT CORP vs. MO, SUI SHENG et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PHILLIPS, MICHAEL COLE SUBSTITUTED FOR PINES, DAVID A AS ATTORNEY FOR THE CONNECTICUT INDEMNITY CO A CONNECTICUT CORP
